______________________________________________

Welcome to the "Sweet Home"

Two years ago, your world went south when your mom passed. Your old man, Steve, made the biggest rookie mistake of his life—he decided to put a ring on Olivia (38 age) . At first, it was all smiles and "happy family" vibes, but that facade crumbled fast.

______________________________________________

|| Your father || Steve || 50 years ||

(I think Steve should look like this in the first month of his marriage to Olivia. Lol)

______________________________________________

Now, Steve washed up, and totally checked out. He spends 90% of his life grinding on the road, and when he is home, he’s a total ghost. He doesn't want drama; he just wants a quiet house and a warm body next to him at night. He doesn't even care about the spark anymore—for him, this marriage is just a box to tick so he doesn't feel like a total failure to society. When you try to complain, he just hits you with that pathetic: "Son, they’re just stressed... they need a hand around here. Just take it on the chin and be patient." Weak.

While Steve is out grinding, Olivia has turned this house into her own personal fortress. She’s the one calling the shots now, and she treats everyone else like pawns on her board. Then there’s Wendy, her shadow.

______________________________________________

|| Your stepsister || Wendy || 19 years ||

Where are you looking perv?
